projects.name: Codex Automation
projects.description: Runner, GitHub trigger queue, and BugDB helper scripts.
projects.context: Use the codex_automation repository. This project owns the GitHub issue runner, config files, BugDB create helper, and trigger UI.

projects.name: Employment Process UI
projects.description: Employment process UI local ALM checkout.
projects.context: Use the employment-process-ui local checkout. Treat this as the selected ALM project context for code inspection, fixes, tests, and VBCS/Fusion HCM UI work.

projects.name: Employment Other UI
projects.description: Employment other UI local ALM checkout.
projects.context: Use the employment-other-ui local checkout. Treat this as the selected ALM project context for code inspection, fixes, tests, and VBCS/Fusion HCM UI work.

projects.name: Employment All
projects.description: Parent folder for multiple employment UI projects.
projects.context: Use the employment-all aggregate context when the task needs to compare or search across employment-process-ui and employment-other-ui.
